commit_scope: Remove Bumi Sehat from hardcoded aligned-community detail routes so a Bali care institution is not presented as a living-community design example.

commands: cd web && npm test -- tests/aligned-communities-static.test.ts (first pass found missing fresh-worktree dependency: vitest)
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
python3 scripts/worktree_pr_guard.py --mode local --base-ref origin/main (first pass found transient automation_usage 1.281s > 1s)
local_validation.summary: Bumi Sehat remains valid as a Bali care lineage note where explicitly held by Urs, but it no longer resolves as a /vision/aligned living-community detail route. Production /api/vision/aligned was checked and was not listing Bumi Sehat in the graph-backed community catalog. Local PR guard passed with ready_for_push=True on rerun after the known automation_usage warmup threshold.
